narrative:
Rocky-River municipal court district has 88,145 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.7% D−R vs +2.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
